$description: Component tokens for Mobile Message Card — a promotional/informational card component with a heading, optional paragraph, optional CTA button, and artwork. Supports 3 artwork types (illustration = 97px square decorative graphic at right; Image Left = 102px-wide photo strip at left edge; Image top = full-width photo banner above content), 2 layout modes (Heading = title + CTA only; Heading + Para = title + supporting text + CTA), and 3 button types (None = text only; Ghost = full-width link-style CTA using the Button component; Tertiary = pill-style CTA using the Button component). Ghost and Tertiary buttons are nested Button components from the same file — their internal tokens (bg, text color, border, typography, height, padding) are defined in the Button component and are excluded here. Figma Reference: Node ID 622-13407

$component.name: Message Card
$component.description: A mobile card component used to surface promotional content, feature announcements, or contextual callouts. Combines a text content section (heading + optional supporting paragraph) with one of three artwork presentations and an optional CTA. White card surface with gray border and sm shadow. Fixed 361px width.
$component.structure: White bordered card (8px radius, 361px wide). Layout direction depends on artwork: illustration and Image Left use a horizontal flex row (content left, artwork right); Image top uses a vertical flex column (image banner top, content below). Content section contains heading text, optional paragraph, and optional Button component (Ghost or Tertiary).

artwork.illustration: 97×97px decorative illustration at the right end of the card, vertically centered
artwork.Image Left: 102px-wide full-height photo strip flush with the left edge of the card, content to the right
artwork.Image top: Full-width photo banner at the top of the card; content stacks below. Banner height varies by layout and button presence (102px, 118px, or 158px)

layout.Heading: Heading text + optional CTA button only
layout.Heading + Para: Heading text + supporting paragraph + optional CTA button

button.Ghost: Full-width ghost link button (Button component, w-full). Shows label + arrow-right icon.
button.Tertiary: Compact pill-shaped tertiary button (Button component, intrinsic width). Shows label only.

nested-components.Button: Node IDs 1:864 (Ghost) and 1:824 (Tertiary) — Button component from the same file. Internal button tokens (background, text color, border, typography, height, padding, border-radius) are defined in the Button component's own tokens and are intentionally excluded from this file.

usage.contexts: Feature announcements, onboarding callouts, promotional cards, content teasers, empty-state promotions, upsell surfaces
usage.features: 3 artwork types (illustration, left image, top image), 2 text layouts (heading-only, heading+paragraph), 3 button options (none, ghost, tertiary), fixed 361px width, shadow/sm depth

container.$comment: Outer card container — white surface, gray border, 8px radius, shadow/sm

width.description: Mobile message card container fixed width - 361px

radius.description: Mobile message card container border radius - 8px

width.description: Mobile message card container border width - 1px

background.description: Mobile message card container background - white - #ffffff

border.description: Mobile message card container border color - neutral/gray.200 - #eaecf0

shadow.description: Mobile message card container shadow - shadow/sm - 0px 1px 3px rgba(16,24,40,0.10), 0px 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,0.06)

content.$comment: Text+button content section — left column in illustration/image-left layouts; bottom section in image-top layout

left.description: Mobile message card content section left padding - 16px (right side left open for artwork or image)

vertical.description: Mobile message card content section top and bottom padding - 16px

gap.description: Mobile message card content section vertical gap between heading, paragraph, and button - 8px

fixed.description: Mobile message card content section fixed width for heading-only layout variants (illustration and Image Left artwork, Image top heading-only). Heading + Para variants use flex-1 (remaining width).

heading.$comment: Primary heading text — displayed in all layout variants

text.description: Mobile message card heading text color - neutral/gray.900 - #101828

typography.description: Mobile message card heading typography - Inter Bold 20px, 30px line-height (font/size/4xl, font/line-height/4xl)

paragraph.$comment: Supporting paragraph text — only shown in 'Heading + Para' layout variant

text.description: Mobile message card paragraph text color - neutral/gray.500 - #667085

typography.description: Mobile message card paragraph typography - Inter Regular 16px, 24px line-height (font/size/2xl, font/line-height/2xl)

artwork.$comment: Artwork area — conditionally rendered based on the artwork variant

illustration.$comment: artwork=illustration — 97px square decorative graphic, right-aligned, vertically centered

size.description: Mobile message card illustration artwork size (width and height) - 97px square

image-left.$comment: artwork=Image Left — full-height photo strip flush with the left card edge

width.description: Mobile message card image-left artwork width - 102px (full card height, object-cover)

image-top.$comment: artwork=Image top — full-width photo banner above the content section. Height varies by layout+button combination.

width.description: Mobile message card image-top artwork width - 100% of card width

heading.description: Mobile message card image-top height for Heading-only layout (Ghost or Tertiary button) - 102px

heading-para.description: Mobile message card image-top height for Heading + Para layout with Ghost or Tertiary button - 158px

none.description: Mobile message card image-top height for Heading + Para layout with no button (button=None) - 118px
